name: Grilled Hawaiian Fish with Papaya Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill to medium heat.
2. Season the fish with salt and pepper, then place it on the hot grates.
3. Grill the fish for about 4-5 minutes per side until cooked through.
4. Remove the fish from the grill and set aside.
5. Prepare the papaya relish by dicing fresh papaya, cilantro, and adding a pinch of salt and pepper.
6. Serve the grilled Hawaiian fish with the papaya relish on the side.
